description: Let AI agents interact with debug probes — connect, flash, read/write memory, and reset.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.es617/dbgprobe-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Debug probe backend to use (default: jlink). Future: openocd, pyocd.
environmentVariables.name: DBGPROBE_BACKEND

environmentVariables.description: Log level: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING (default), ERROR.
environmentVariables.name: DBGPROBE_MCP_LOG_LEVEL

environmentVariables.description: Explicit path to JLinkExe (or JLink.exe on Windows). Auto-detected if not set.
environmentVariables.name: DBGPROBE_JLINK_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Explicit path to JLinkGDBServerCLExe. Auto-detected if not set.
environmentVariables.name: DBGPROBE_JLINK_GDBSERVER_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Default target device string (e.g. nRF52840_xxAA). Can be overridden per-session.
environmentVariables.name: DBGPROBE_JLINK_DEVICE

environmentVariables.description: Plugin policy: 'all' or comma-separated plugin names. Unset = disabled.
environmentVariables.name: DBGPROBE_MCP_PLUGINS

environmentVariables.description: Tool name separator character (default '.'). Set to '_' for clients that reject dots (e.g. Cursor).
environmentVariables.name: DBGPROBE_MCP_TOOL_SEPARATOR
